info.name: LocQar API
info.description:
LocQar Smart Locker Platform — Express/Prisma API (port 3001).

Setup:
1. Set baseUrl to http://localhost:3001
2. Set winnsenKey (WINNSEN_INBOUND_API_KEY from .env)
3. Customer OTP flow: Request OTP -> Verify OTP (customerToken auto-saved)
4. Agent: Login with password (agentToken auto-saved)
5. Admin: Login with email+password (token auto-saved)

Seed accounts:
- Customer: +233200000003
- Partner:  +233200000001 / apiKey printed by npm run seed
- Agent/Courier: +233200000002 / Test@1234
- Admin: admin@locqar.com / Admin1234!
- Locker: code TEST-01, SN WINNSEN-TEST-SN-001

item.name: Callbacks - Winnsen Cloud to Server (no auth)
